# btpservice_cicd_credential_cloud_connector (Resource)

Manages a Cloud Connector credential in the SAP BTP CI/CD service.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "btpservice_cicd_credential_cloud_connector" "example" {
  name        = "my-cloud-connector"
  description = "Cloud Connector for on-premise system access"
  location_id = "my-location-id"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `location_id` (String) Location ID of the Cloud Connector instance.
- `name` (String) Credential name. Must contain only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Optional human-readable description.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the resource (assigned by the API).

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```terraform
terraform import btpservice_cicd_credential_cloud_connector.<resource_name> <id>
terraform import btpservice_cicd_credential_cloud_connector.example dd005d8b-1fee-4e6b-b6ff-cb9a197b7fe0
```
